summary: Excellent matrix recording of a stellar 1974 show, delivering superb ambience and top‑notch performance.
review: The June 22 1974 Jai‑Alai Fronton concert shines thanks to a beautifully blended soundboard‑audience matrix that captures crystal‑clear instrument detail while preserving the crowd’s excitement. Reviewers rave about the high energy, flawless setlist flow and consider it one of the best shows from that period, with only minor early‑night level tweaks noted.

ai_rating.rationale: All reviewers give 4–5 stars and praise both the musical performance and the superb matrix mix; only a single 4‑star note mentions minor level adjustments, leading to an overall near‑perfect rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Beautifully mixed soundboard and audience tapes; crisp, clear instrument separation with lively crowd ambience. Early show levels are a bit low but are corrected by mid‑song (around Promised Land).

show_quality.setlist_flow: High energy performance that flows smoothly; many reviewers claim it eclipses the following night’s show and ranks among the best of June 1974.
